programs.title: Detroit ER
programs.desc: Medical staff treats a patient who was hit by a train while crossing the tracks.

programs.title: Detroit ER
programs.desc: Medical staff treats patient injured in a car wreck involving multiple vehicles.

programs.title: About Face
programs.desc: Dr. Roostaeian treats a man with a giant crater in his face left by a tumor; Dr. Panossian operates on a patient who's unable to close her eye and is at risk of losing her sight.

programs.title: About Face
programs.desc: The team treats a woman with a dog bite; Dr. Panossian and Dr. Rovelo remove hundreds of tumors from a woman's face.

programs.title: About Face
programs.desc: When faced with treating a man whose cheek is about to pop due to a 4lb tumor, Dr. Panossian worries it could become a deadly situation; a woman whose lower lip won't stop growing turns to Dr. Rovelo for help.

programs.title: About Face
programs.desc: Dr. Roostaeian wants to help a young woman living with the largest birthmark he's ever seen, however, surgery could be life-threatening; after being hit by a drunk driver, Dr. Rovelo's patient hasn't been able to close his mouth.
